title: Frontend Batch 15 - Public Home Date and Detail Ordering Reinforcement
summary: Reinforced public home invalid date fallbacks and public blog/work detail related ordering with invalid or missing dates.
behaviorBugsFound: Public home featured Work and recent Study cards could display Invalid Date.
Blog detail related ordering could place malformed-date posts ahead of valid dated posts.
Work detail related ordering could place malformed-date works ahead of valid dated works.

validation.command: npx skills find nextjs server component date testing
validation.notes: External skills found; no new skill installed.

validation.result: failed before fixes, passed after fixes

remainingGaps: Admin dashboard/list date formatting remains outside these public-only batches.
Public detail sort helpers are duplicated between blog/work route modules.
Locale/timezone display consistency has not been audited as a standalone concern.
recommendation: Proceed to Frontend Batch 16 - Admin Date and List Robustness Reinforcement.
